entries.name: The legendary Kinetic Wombo Combo.
entries.creator: Tobgun1
tags:
The legend! The myth!
Does it exist, or doesn't it? Who really knows? 
One thing's for sure—you can now get it here!! - as a brand-new upload, exclusively from us!
The legendary Kinetic Wombo Combo.
"No magic, no mumbo jumbo—just a pure Kinetic Wombo Combo."
Enjoy!
P.S. This version has been slightly modified to make it clear that it is a modded weapon. I added a small line of text (Bullet Hose    Guns with Vladof-licensed parts have a 30% Chance to add an extra Projectile per shot) and changed its color so it can't accidentally be mistaken for a legitimate weapon.

entries.name: Hungry Evicerating Stray
entries.creator: DrkStryker
tags: Wipe out entire arenas in an instant with this multiple projectile beast! Perfect for the new Takedown or wherever a mob comes your way.

entries.name: Noisy Cricket
entries.creator: Fen Integrum
tags:
Like its pistol cousin of the same name, this Noisy Cricket is effectively a jetpack capable of soaring. Blast off into the sky, simply aim down, jump, and glide. So what if it's backwards? It is a feature, not bug. Likewise, glide forward while firing in order to hover indefinitely, provided you manage your glide meter well enough. 
An Integrum Arts, we take pride in how we get across enormous gaping chasms, unlike my non-canonical cousin, Zane.
TAKE TO THE FEKKEN SKIES, WITH THE AIR SUPERIORITY COLLECTION

entries.name: Noisy Cricket
entries.creator: Fen Integrum
tags: The consummate might of all order pistols, this is the Savage Sonic death ray, by firing while gliding forward, you can hover in place while unloading this bottomless rocket launcher, or you can aim downward to thrust yourself upward and to travel great distances backwards. You can literally launch yourself the twin, and you can maintain air superiority during combat with this gem by doing the same. Fire while gliding forward to hover. Fire while gliding backward for evasive maneuvers, and high soaring.

entries.name: Integrum Arts Smart Dagger
entries.creator: Fen Integrum
tags:
Take to the Fekken Skies with Integrum Arts! This is the last Knife you'll every need!. It's slices, it dices, it makes julienne fries between kills!
With our new open source smart technology, this knife exploits whatever elemental weaknesses the target has in real time. If they are weak against any element, this knife will not only deal that elemental damage, it will also enhance their weakness.
Schock, Corrosive, and Incendiary Override built in!
Bismuth enhanced!
This knife gives you a 23% movement speed buff!
Over 42k base damage!
Includes PENETRATOR, SUPPRESSOR, and Alchemical augments!

entries.name: Chidori Symmetry
entries.creator: Fen Integrum
tags:
Chidori!!!!
3 railgun blasts hit from ahead 3 effigy bursts from behind! 6 attacks per trigger pull, And virtually unlimited ammo, launch your Chidori today, and show them the will of fire!
Enhanced for speed and multiple hits per trigger pull, this gun is loaded with ricochet mechanics intended to simulate a chain effect.

entries.name: The Hardest Nippy
entries.creator: Fen Integrum
tags:
The first Borderlands weapon with a worthiness enchantment!
This intelligent weapon only allows its primary fire to be wielded by one with the hardest nippies. But, because nippies always come in twos, there is an alt fire that will work even for those without worthy nippies. 
The HARDEST nippy

entries.name: The Gohan: Vex
entries.creator: Fen Integrum
tags:
The final mod you'll ever need for Vex 
This unlocks every class power, including Avatar, teen witch, misericorde, and more 
All skills
All Attunements
All Command powers
Etc

entries.name: Apocalypse Stray
entries.creator: ZK
tags: Apocalypse Now themed stray w/deadalus smg (forgot to put that on the card haha). Lots of colorful bullets flying around, designed for the Takedown. Clears rooms on mayhem Level 20 in a jiffy.

entries.name: Apocalypse Stray
entries.creator: ZK
tags: Apocalypse Now themed stray w/deadalus smg. Lots of colorful bullets flying around and ricocheting, because it has the lockjaw feature. Fire w/Pearlescent Corrosive. Designed for Rippers, Creature Encounters and Bossing. Clears a Eipper Camp lickety split and melts bosses in an instant! Wherever those pesky foes are hiding, this gun will find them. ORDER DON'T SURF, BABY!
